description: EPRA-licensed Class C-2 electrical contractor based in Nairobi. No independent web presence found; appears only in EPRA licensed contractor registers.
EPRA-licensed Class C-1 electrical contractor based in Nakuru. Also registered with NCA for electrical engineering services. No independent web presence found.

EPRA-licensed Class A-1 electrical contractor based in Machakos. Note: beemaps.com is an unrelated crypto mapping company (Hivemapper). No verifiable web presence for the Kenyan electrical contractor entity.
EPRA-licensed Class C-1 electrical contractor based in Nairobi. Appears in trade import records (Trademo) with 292 shipment count. No dedicated website found.
EPRA-licensed Class C-2 electrical contractor based in Bungoma offering power applications, electrical installations, and repair services. Has a Facebook page with 35 likes.

BioLite designs, manufactures, and sells innovative consumer energy products for off-grid communities including clean cookstoves, solar lighting, and solar-powered charging solutions. The Kenyan subsidiary (BioLite Holdings Kenya Limited) is registered for electrical equipment manufacturing.

Kenyan supplier/manufacturer with experience in non-specialized goods/services, water, sanitation and hygiene sectors. Has worked with World Bank projects. Registered as a private limited liability company. No dedicated website found.

Suntech Power Limited is a Kenyan company registered by EPRA focused on supply and distribution of solar and energy-related equipment in East Africa, including solar water heating systems, solar inverters, solar pumping solutions, solar batteries, and backup systems.
EPRA-licensed Class C-1 electrical contractor based in Nairobi. No independent web presence found; appears only in EPRA licensed contractor registers.
EPRA-licensed Class B electrical contractor based in Nairobi. No independent web presence found; appears only in EPRA licensed contractor registers.
EPRA-licensed Class C-2 electrical contractor based in Tiriki (Vihiga County). No independent web presence found.

Mombasa-based company involved in electrical contracting and management consulting. Listed on multiple Kenyan business directories. Part of the Tash Group with offices at Ecolite Center, Lumumba Rd, Mombasa.
EPRA-licensed Class C-2 electrical contractor based in Nyahururu. No independent web presence found; appears only in EPRA licensed contractor registers.

Fast-growing electromechanical service provider based in Nairobi specializing in substations and switchyards electrical engineering solutions including design, procurement, project management, construction, and maintenance.
EPRA-licensed Class B electrical contractor based in Nairobi. No independent web presence found.

Well-known multinational engineering and construction company incorporated in 2004 in Kenya. Specializes in composite repairs of pipes and tanks, construction of power substations, MV/LV networks, overhead distribution, and general commercial constructions. Headquartered at Brisma Towers off Magadi Road, Nairobi.
EPRA-licensed Class C-1 electrical contractor based in Nairobi. No independent web presence found.

Magal Solutions Kenya is the East African regional hub of global security integrator Magal Security Systems. Provides advanced integrated security solutions for airports, seaports, energy infrastructure, and government institutions, including perimeter intrusion detection, video analytics, CCTV, and access control systems.
EPRA-licensed Class C-2 electrical contractor based in Busia. No independent web presence found; appears only in EPRA licensed contractor registers.
